style: modern flat vector game art with soft glow, smooth shading, clean readable silhouette, single subject centered and filling most of the frame, fully original, no existing IP, no brand logos, no text, no watermark

assets.name: bg
assets.prompt: a calm dark vertical gradient game background, deep blue to teal, faint floating particle bokeh, non-distracting, opaque full-bleed

assets.name: icon
assets.prompt: a square mobile app icon: a single glowing cyan mascot with simple dot eyes on a dark rounded-square background, high contrast

assets.name: hero
assets.prompt: a cute glowing green blob mascot with friendly dot eyes (green subject -> magenta screen so it is not keyed out)

assets.name: enemy
assets.prompt: a small menacing red creature enemy with angry eyes (red subject -> green screen)
